originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&argc` is never used.

reasoning: Line 16: `--argc` in main() decrements argc but value is never read again — dead store. This is in main() outside any #ifdef, occurring in all configurations. No '// ERROR' for argc dead store → new bug not in VBDB. PC requires UNREGISTER=F AND SCAN=F, but argc is dead regardless of these flags. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
